evidence: "Excellent series. Actors were expertly cast. I enjoyed this very much."
"I was expecting more. I was disappointed. Perhaps this dvd was just not long enough for a real in depth look at these queens."
"I was a little disappointed the dvd wasn't longer. It seems there could have been much more to show in something like this."
"The choices of Helen Mirren as Elizabeth I and Jeremy Iron as Robin Dudley were very appropriate. Both actors did a superb job."
"I love the music. Love the stage version, the 10th anniversary and the 25th anniversary."
"I was really impressed by the clever way the jewels were used. I never knew any of this. It was informative and enjoyable."
"It was wonderful. Then the same night it was on PBS. These men, including little Daniel are fantastic. They never disappoint."

summary: The user shows a strong preference for historical and musical genres, appreciating high production quality and emotional resonance in their viewing experiences. They tend to favor slower-paced narratives but express some disappointment when content lacks depth or length.
